标题: SADOER | 10pcs SADOER Collagen Anti Wrinkle Face Mask Moisturizing Anti aging Repair Brightening Facial Masks Skin Care
详情: [{"type": "image", "url": "https://filebroker-cdn.lazada.sg/kf/S4e139571208348e180bd97db06552317K.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://filebroker-cdn.lazada.sg/kf/S64c41ba15524409582144fe49f8e3194o.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://filebroker-cdn.lazada.sg/kf/S406e0b1d990f4bf798f8755803ca73f6e.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://filebroker-cdn.lazada.sg/kf/S2860fa2b037b45a5a107f82f253b8aa2H.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://filebroker-cdn.lazada.sg/kf/Scaad0c8ecfb840efad12f75b068f4560d.jpg"}, {"type": "text", "text": "Product Introduction: The SADOER Collagen Anti Wrinkle Face Mask is a revolutionary skincare product designed to combat the signs of aging while providing deep hydration and nourishment to your skin. Infused with high-quality collagen, this face mask works to restore elasticity and firmness, making your skin appear youthful and radiant. The unique formulation not only targets fine lines and wrinkles but also enhances your skin's overall texture and tone. With regular use, you will notice a significant improvement in your skin's appearance, leaving it looking revitalized and glowing. This mask is suitable for all skin types and is an essential addition to your skincare routine, especially for those seeking to maintain a youthful complexion. Product Features: The SADOER Collagen Anti Wrinkle Face Mask boasts a range of impressive features that set it apart from other facial masks on the market. Firstly, it is enriched with premium collagen, which is known for its ability to improve skin elasticity and reduce the appearance of wrinkles. Additionally, the mask contains moisturizing agents that deeply hydrate the skin, ensuring that it remains supple and soft. The brightening properties of the mask help to even out skin tone and diminish dark spots, giving you a more luminous complexion. Furthermore, the mask is easy to apply and adheres comfortably to the face, allowing for maximum absorption of the active ingredients. With its anti-aging benefits and skin-repairing properties, this mask is a must-have for anyone looking to enhance their skincare regimen. How to use: Using the SADOER Collagen Anti Wrinkle Face Mask is a simple and enjoyable process that can easily be incorporated into your skincare routine. Begin by cleansing your face thoroughly to remove any makeup, dirt, or impurities. Pat your skin dry with a clean towel. Next, carefully remove the mask from its packaging and unfold it gently. Align the mask with your facial contours, ensuring that it covers your entire face, including the forehead, cheeks, and chin. Press down lightly to ensure that the mask adheres well to your skin. Leave the mask on for 15 to 20 minutes, allowing the collagen and other active ingredients to penetrate deeply into your skin. After the recommended time, gently peel off the mask and discard it. To maximize the benefits, follow up with your favorite moisturizer or serum to lock in hydration and nourishment. For best results, use the mask 2 to 3 times a week. Gentle Reminder: While the SADOER Collagen Anti Wrinkle Face Mask is designed to be safe and effective for all skin types, it is always advisable to perform a patch test before full application. Apply a small amount of the product on a discreet area of your skin and wait for 24 hours to check for any adverse reactions. If you experience any irritation, redness, or discomfort, discontinue use immediately. Additionally, store the masks in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight to maintain their efficacy. Remember that consistency is key in skincare; for optimal results, incorporate the mask into your regular routine and combine it with a balanced diet and adequate hydration. Product Introduction:

The SADOER Collagen Anti Wrinkle Face Mask is a revolutionary skincare product designed to combat the signs of aging while providing deep hydration and nourishment to your skin. Infused with high-quality collagen, this face mask works to restore elasticity and firmness, making your skin appear youthful and radiant. The unique formulation not only targets fine lines and wrinkles but also enhances your skin's overall texture and tone. With regular use, you will notice a significant improvement in your skin's appearance, leaving it looking revitalized and glowing. This mask is suitable for all skin types and is an essential addition to your skincare routine, especially for those seeking to maintain a youthful complexion.

Product Features:

The SADOER Collagen Anti Wrinkle Face Mask boasts a range of impressive features that set it apart from other facial masks on the market. Firstly, it is enriched with premium collagen, which is known for its ability to improve skin elasticity and reduce the appearance of wrinkles. Additionally, the mask contains moisturizing agents that deeply hydrate the skin, ensuring that it remains supple and soft. The brightening properties of the mask help to even out skin tone and diminish dark spots, giving you a more luminous complexion. Furthermore, the mask is easy to apply and adheres comfortably to the face, allowing for maximum absorption of the active ingredients. With its anti-aging benefits and skin-repairing properties, this mask is a must-have for anyone looking to enhance their skincare regimen.

How to use:

Using the SADOER Collagen Anti Wrinkle Face Mask is a simple and enjoyable process that can easily be incorporated into your skincare routine. Begin by cleansing your face thoroughly to remove any makeup, dirt, or impurities. Pat your skin dry with a clean towel. Next, carefully remove the mask from its packaging and unfold it gently. Align the mask with your facial contours, ensuring that it covers your entire face, including the forehead, cheeks, and chin. Press down lightly to ensure that the mask adheres well to your skin. Leave the mask on for 15 to 20 minutes, allowing the collagen and other active ingredients to penetrate deeply into your skin. After the recommended time, gently peel off the mask and discard it. To maximize the benefits, follow up with your favorite moisturizer or serum to lock in hydration and nourishment. For best results, use the mask 2 to 3 times a week.

Gentle Reminder:

While the SADOER Collagen Anti Wrinkle Face Mask is designed to be safe and effective for all skin types, it is always advisable to perform a patch test before full application. Apply a small amount of the product on a discreet area of your skin and wait for 24 hours to check for any adverse reactions. If you experience any irritation, redness, or discomfort, discontinue use immediately. Additionally, store the masks in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight to maintain their efficacy. Remember that consistency is key in skincare; for optimal results, incorporate the mask into your regular routine and combine it with a balanced diet and adequate hydration. Lastly, while the mask provides significant anti-aging benefits, it is essential to protect your skin from sun exposure by using sunscreen daily.

Features：

1. Added collagen can penetrate deep into the bottom of the skin to form a water-locking barrier and maintain the skin's hydration for a long time.

2. Helps restore loose skin to firmness and plumpness. Long-term use can effectively resist the erosion of time and make skin glow with youthful vitality.

3. Effectively fills and fades fine lines and wrinkles caused by age or environmental factors, making the skin surface smoother and more delicate, regaining a silky touch.

Usages：

1. Clean facial skin and keep it dry.

2. Take out the mask, unfold it gently to avoid deformation caused by excessive pulling, align it with the eyes, nose, and mouth, spread it flat on the face, and then press it gently with your fingers to ensure that the mask is completely attached to the skin and eliminate air bubbles.

3. After 15-20 minutes, peel off the mask and gently massage your face with your fingertips to help the remaining essence be completely absorbed by the skin.

Product Details:

★【LIGHTWEIGHT LONG-LASTING COVERAGE】: Our Face Powder is long lasting and helps give full coverage that feels lightweight enough to wear all day. This face powder can be used as a foundation or setting powder and helps your face look smooth and oil free

★【24 HOURS OIL CONTROL】:Ideal for normal to oily skin, this long-lasting powder leaves a natural, poreless-looking finish with 24H oil control

★【Excellent SUN BLOCK】:O.TWO.O Face Powder Sun Protection Index SPF30 PA+++，Keeps you out of the sun without fear of UV rays

★【WATERPROOF & SWEATPROOF】:In the hot summer, it has excellent waterproof and sweat resistance, allowing you to be fearless of the heat in the summer

HOW TO CHOOSE COLOR？

标题: [THE FACE SHOP] Real Nature Facial Mask 1 PC
详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Real Nature is a mask sheet line that contains serum using natural extracts to moisturize and soften the skin. Aloe: The soothing, hydrating sheet mask with aloe extract is gentle on sensitive skin. Avocado: This moisturizing and nourishing sheet mask with avocado extract hydrates and nourishes skin. Bamboo: The revitalizing, hydrating sheet mask with bamboo extract moisturizes skin to revitalize your complexion. Blueberry: The sheet mask with blueberry extract creates a firming moisture barrier to revitalize and energize skin. Calendula: The soothing, moisturizing sheet mask with calendula extract calms skin, leaving it feeling comfortable. Cucumber: The balancing sheet mask with cucumber extract restores moisture to skins that are in need of hydration. Green Tea: The hydrating, clarifying sheet mask with green tea extract infuses skin with moisture to clarify your complexion. Kelp: The purifying sheet mask with kelp extract tones tired skin chapped and stressed by the elements, leaving it smooth and clear. Lemon: The brightening sheet mask with lemon extract brightens dull skin to create a radiant look. Lingzhi: The radiance firming sheet mask with lingzhi mushroom stem extract nourishes skin and promotes skin elasticity. Lotus: The hydrating, purifying sheet mask with lotus flower infuses skin with moisture, leaving it feeling clean. Mung Bean: The pore-tightening sheet mask with mung bean extract temporarily tightens pores to create a smoother complexion. Olive: The ultra-moisturising sheet mask with olive extract deeply hydrates dry, rough skin. Pomegranate: The firming and revitalising sheet mask with pomegranate extract restore skin's elasticity and vitality. Potato: This soothing sheet mask with potato extract provides a cooling sensation to relive skin that looks tired due to exposure to strong sunlight. Red Ginseng: The firming sheet mask with red ginseng extract deeply nourishes skin to make it firmer. Rice: The brightening sheet mask with rice extract softens and brighten rough, darkened skin. Shea Butter: The nourishing and firming sheet mask with shea butter extract deeply nourishes dry skin to improve its elasticity. Tea Tree: The refreshing and soothing sheet mask with tea tree extract helps smooth skin that is shiny due to excess oil"}]

"desc": "

Real Nature is a mask sheet line that contains serum using natural extracts to moisturize and soften the skin.

  • Aloe: The soothing, hydrating sheet mask with aloe extract is gentle on sensitive skin.
  • Avocado: This moisturizing and nourishing sheet mask with avocado extract hydrates and nourishes skin.
  • Bamboo: The revitalizing, hydrating sheet mask with bamboo extract moisturizes skin to revitalize your complexion.
  • Blueberry: The sheet mask with blueberry extract creates a firming moisture barrier to revitalize and energize skin.
  • Calendula: The soothing, moisturizing sheet mask with calendula extract calms skin, leaving it feeling comfortable.
  • Cucumber: The balancing sheet mask with cucumber extract restores moisture to skins that are in need of hydration.
  • Green Tea: The hydrating, clarifying sheet mask with green tea extract infuses skin with moisture to clarify your complexion.
  • Kelp: The purifying sheet mask with kelp extract tones tired skin chapped and stressed by the elements, leaving it smooth and clear.
  • Lemon: The brightening sheet mask with lemon extract brightens dull skin to create a radiant look.
  • Lingzhi: The radiance firming sheet mask with lingzhi mushroom stem extract nourishes skin and promotes skin elasticity.
  • Lotus: The hydrating, purifying sheet mask with lotus flower infuses skin with moisture, leaving it feeling clean.
  • Mung Bean: The pore-tightening sheet mask with mung bean extract temporarily tightens pores to create a smoother complexion.
  • Olive: The ultra-moisturising sheet mask with olive extract deeply hydrates dry, rough skin.
  • Pomegranate: The firming and revitalising sheet mask with pomegranate extract restore skin's elasticity and vitality.
  • Potato: This soothing sheet mask with potato extract provides a cooling sensation to relive skin that looks tired due to exposure to strong sunlight.
  • Red Ginseng: The firming sheet mask with red ginseng extract deeply nourishes skin to make it firmer.
  • Rice: The brightening sheet mask with rice extract softens and brighten rough, darkened skin.
  • Shea Butter: The nourishing and firming sheet mask with shea butter extract deeply nourishes dry skin to improve its elasticity.
  • Tea Tree: The refreshing and soothing sheet mask with tea tree extract helps smooth skin that is shiny due to excess oil

Features:

1. Repair damaged barriers, protect sensitive skin, and alleviate redness symptoms.

2. Soothing and stabilizing, enhancing skin resistance.

3. Long term water locking and moisturizing, improving dryness symptoms caused by skin moisture loss.

4. The facial mask cloth is soft and close to the skin, breathable and comfortable.

5. Improve roughness and dullness, enhance skin texture, and brighten and smooth facial skin.

6. Effectively shrink pores, refine skin texture, rejuvenate skin condition, and quickly rejuvenate.

How to use:

1. Clean and thoroughly dry your face.

2. After opening the plastic package and stripping the plastic lining, in order to obtain the best effect, use the facial mask immediately after opening the package.

3. Evenly apply the facial mask on the face to ensure that it fits the skin without bubbles.

4. Wear facial mask for 15-25 minutes.

5. Gently smear the surplus essence on the skin and massage until it is completely absorbed.

6. It is recommended to do so at least twice a week. Long term use yields better results.

No need to worry about the white patches from regular white face powders. Now get natural glowing skin without any heaviness of makeup, every day with all new Pond's Natural Glow Face powder. 标题: Gold Foil Peel-Off Mask Peel Off Anti-Wrinkle Face Mask 98% golden Mask Facial For Deeply Cleans Skin Care Acne black mask blackhead removal mask Quickly remove blackheads, shrink pores, and fine skin Facial Treatment Mask 80g
详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "【Product Information】 **Gold Foil Peel-Off Mask** - Experience the luxury of radiant, youthful skin with our Lifting Firming/Anti-Ageing Gold Foil Peel-Off Mask. Formulated with premium ingredients, this mask is designed to deliver intense hydration, deep cleansing, and effective anti-ageing benefits. The unique gold foil technology not only enhances the mask's efficacy but also gives your skin a touch of opulence. **Key Benefits:** - **Lifting and Firming:** Enriched with potent anti-ageing ingredients, this mask helps to lift and firm sagging skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. - **Moisturizing and Nourishing:** Provides deep hydration, leaving your skin feeling soft, supple, and rejuvenated. - **Deep Cleansing:** Effectively removes impurities, dirt, and excess oil from your pores, helping to prevent blackheads and acne. - **Exfoliating Action:** Gently exfoliates dead skin cells, promoting a smoother and brighter complexion. **How to Use:** 1. **Cleanse:** Start with a clean face. Use your regular cleanser to remove any makeup, dirt, and oil. 2. **Apply:** Evenly apply a generous layer of the mask to your face, avoiding the eye and lip areas. Ensure the layer is thick enough for easy peeling. 3. **Relax:** Leave the mask on for 20-30 minutes or until it is completely dry. Relax and let the mask work its magic. 4. **Peel Off:** Gently peel off the mask starting from the bottom and moving upwards. Rinse off any residue with warm water. 5. **Moisturize:** Follow up with your favorite moisturizer to lock in the benefits. **Suitable For:** - **All Skin Types:** Ideal for normal, oily, combination, and dry skin. 【Product Information】

**Gold Foil Peel-Off Mask** - Experience the luxury of radiant, youthful skin with our Lifting Firming/Anti-Ageing Gold Foil Peel-Off Mask. Formulated with premium ingredients, this mask is designed to deliver intense hydration, deep cleansing, and effective anti-ageing benefits. The unique gold foil technology not only enhances the mask's efficacy but also gives your skin a touch of opulence.

**Key Benefits:**

- **Lifting and Firming:** Enriched with potent anti-ageing ingredients, this mask helps to lift and firm sagging skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.

- **Moisturizing and Nourishing:** Provides deep hydration, leaving your skin feeling soft, supple, and rejuvenated.

- **Deep Cleansing:** Effectively removes impurities, dirt, and excess oil from your pores, helping to prevent blackheads and acne.

- **Exfoliating Action:** Gently exfoliates dead skin cells, promoting a smoother and brighter complexion.

**How to Use:**

1. **Cleanse:** Start with a clean face. Use your regular cleanser to remove any makeup, dirt, and oil.

2. **Apply:** Evenly apply a generous layer of the mask to your face, avoiding the eye and lip areas. Ensure the layer is thick enough for easy peeling.

3. **Relax:** Leave the mask on for 20-30 minutes or until it is completely dry. Relax and let the mask work its magic.

4. **Peel Off:** Gently peel off the mask starting from the bottom and moving upwards. Rinse off any residue with warm water.

5. **Moisturize:** Follow up with your favorite moisturizer to lock in the benefits.

**Suitable For:**

- **All Skin Types:** Ideal for normal, oily, combination, and dry skin. Those with sensitive skin should perform a patch test before full application.

- **Anti-Ageing Needs:** Perfect for individuals looking to combat signs of ageing such as fine lines, wrinkles, and loss of firmness.

- **Deep Cleansing Requirements:** Suitable for anyone seeking to deeply cleanse their skin and remove blackheads effectively.

**Caution:**

For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use and consult a dermatologist. Keep out of reach of children.

**Indulge your skin with the Gold Foil Peel-Off Mask and reveal a firmer, more youthful complexion with every use.**

Blush your cheeks with this Lakme Rose Powder which has a light rosy fragrance & sunscreen to protect your soft, peachy skin. The Lakme Rose Powder comes in two warm pink shades which you can pick according to your skin type and occasion. Add the Lakme Rose Powder to your make up kit right away because you need that rosy glow! But the Lakme Rose Powder now! Flawless Skin Every Day If flawless and even skin is what you wish to have, the Lakme Rose Powder is just right for you. This Lakme Rose Powder is infused with extracts of real roses that is sure to nourish your skin. It blends easily and protects your skin from the harmful rays of the sun. Whether you are heading to work or a special occasion, this Lakme Rose Powder 40 g will give your face a gorgeous look every single day. Apply it on your face or over your foundation and say goodbye to oily skin. Must-Have for Every Beauty-Conscious Woman The Lakme Rose Powder makes a great addition to your makeup kit. You can either use a foundation brush or the available puff to apply this Lakme soft pink rose powder on your face. Blend it easily using gentle strokes to achieve a smooth and even finish. Suitable for daily use, the Lakme rose powder with sunscreen compact powder will let you breeze through the day looking fabulous. This classic rose powder has a sweet and subtle fragrance of roses that feels good on your face, while its matte finish controls oily skin for long hours.
